creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Apr 05, 2008 at 10:43:14AM -0300, Fernan Aguero wrote:
> > There are patches failed during make patch. Please look at it and
> > submit a new diff. Thanks!
> 
> Let me know if it's fixed now. Thanks!

$ make patch
===>  Extracting for emboss-5.0.0
=> MD5 Checksum OK for emboss/EMBOSS-5.0.0.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for emboss/EMBOSS-5.0.0.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for emboss-5.0.0
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for emboss-5.0.0
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
32 out of 32 hunks ignored--saving rejects to ajax/ajindex.c.rej
=> Patch patch-ajindex.c failed to apply cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /home/rafan/work/FreeBSD/ports/biology/emboss.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /home/rafan/work/FreeBSD/ports/biology/emboss.


In addition, this part looks strange to me:

.if defined(WITHOUT_X11)
USE_XLIB=       yes
USE_MOTIF=      yes
LIB_DEPENDS=    gd.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/gd \
                png.5:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/png
CONFIGURE_ARGS+= --without-x
.endif

USE_XLIB when WITHOUT_X11 is defined? 

Regards,
Rong-En Fan

> 
> --
> fernan
